title: Commit metadata to course-main
description:
## Objective
.tick/ and .devmeta/ files have been modified on course-main during this iteration's orchestration but weren't part of the feature PR. Commit them now.

## Implementation
1. git status --short — confirm only .tick/, .devmeta/, and possibly tsconfig.tsbuildinfo are dirty
2. git add .tick/ .devmeta/ tsconfig.tsbuildinfo (only if dirty)
3. git status --short again — verify only metadata staged
4. git commit -m 'Update .tick/ and .devmeta/ metadata for iteration 1.1'
5. git push

## Tests
git status — should be clean after push.
Do NOT close until working tree is clean and pushed.
acceptance_criteria: Working tree clean, metadata commit pushed to course-main
